email.body: <g fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2"><path stroke-dasharray="66" d="M4 5h16c0.55 0 1 0.45 1 1v12c0 0.55 -0.45 1 -1 1h-16c-0.55 0 -1 -0.45 -1 -1v-12c0 -0.55 0.45 -1 1 -1Z"><animate fill="freeze" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" dur="0.6s" values="66;0"/></path><path stroke-dasharray="24" stroke-dashoffset="24" d="M3 6.5l9 5.5l9 -5.5"><animate fill="freeze" attributeName="stroke-dashoffset" begin="0.6s" dur="0.3s" to="0"/></path></g>
